name: Pineapple Omelette with Rum
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs with lemon zest (scraping the lemon peel), sugar, and salt.
2. Place butter in a preheated skillet and add egg mixture.
3. When omelette is set and half done, chop pineapple into small pieces.
4. Combine pineapple with jam and rum.
5. Fold the mixture into the omelette for finishing.
6. Sprinkle with sugar and serve.
